title: 秋華賞の後に・トリプルティアラ達成

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon dominates the Shuka Sho and
successfully claims the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a shout-out at the post-race press
conference, citing me as her trusty partner and
the reason behind her progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on to challenge Narita Brian to a
one-on-one at the upcoming Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian watches the broadcast in real time
and laughs to herself, impressed—but not
intimidated.
